message:
feat(node): add input validation and bounds checking across 6 modules

Introduces defensive validation layers to prevent panics, unbounded
memory growth, and security bypasses.

- api/middleware.rs: Guard against sustained_rps==0 to prevent
  division-by-zero in rate limiter configuration
- control_plane/fork_detection.rs: Add bounded history (MAX_HISTORY=10000)
  with draining logic to prevent unbounded memory growth in fork state
  tracking
- control_plane/marker_stream.rs: Replace direct array indexing with
  .get() bounds check to prevent out-of-bounds panics on marker lookup
- control_plane/mmr_proofs.rs: Add sequence bounds checking with proper
  error return to prevent invalid proof construction from panicking
- security/intent_firewall.rs: Refactor path matching from substring
  matching to segment-based matching, preventing path traversal attacks
  via crafted substrings (e.g., "/admin" matching "/not-admin")
- runtime/crash_loop_detector.rs: Minor bounds improvement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
